ddls:
CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest's occupation */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the guest */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the guest */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guests_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the show */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show (e.g., comedy, drama, talk show) */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number of the show */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number of the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appearance */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the appearance */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show the guest appeared on */,
  "appearance_date" TEXT /* Date of the appearance */,
  "appearance_time" TEXT /* Time of the appearance */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the guest in the appearance (e.g., host, guest, performer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appearances_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appearances_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_groups" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appearance_history" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appearance */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the appearance */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show the guest appeared on */,
  "appearance_date" TEXT /* Date of the appearance */,
  "appearance_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the guest has appeared on the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appearance_history_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appearance_history_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the show (e.g., 4.5/5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the show */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the guest

Genre of the show (e.g., comedy, drama, talk show)
ID of the guest making the appearance
ID of the show the guest appeared on
Role of the guest in the appearance (e.g., host, guest, performer)

Number of times the guest has appeared on the show
